categoryIntros.multisig: Multisig wallets require multiple signatures to authorize a transaction. SSP enforces 2-of-2 on every signed action: the browser extension and the mobile SSP Key app must both approve. This page collects the deep-dives that explain how the model works, what attacks it stops, and where its limits sit.
categoryIntros.getting-started: Brand-new to crypto, or returning after a long break? Start here. These guides cover wallets, addresses, transactions, gas, mempools, and finality — the vocabulary you need before you touch real funds.
categoryIntros.security: Self-custody is hard because attacks are creative. This collection walks through the threats that actually catch users: phishing pages, fake support DMs, malicious dApps, lost seeds, and how SSP's 2-of-2 model neutralises most of them.
categoryIntros.how-to: Practical, screenshot-driven walkthroughs for the things SSP users do every day: sending transactions across chains, connecting to dApps via WalletConnect, swapping tokens, and recovering from a lost device.
categoryIntros.coin-guides: Each coin or chain SSP supports has its own quirks — UTXO vs. account-based, native multisig vs. ERC-4337, fee dynamics, finality times. This collection covers them one at a time.
categoryIntros.defi: SSP supports DeFi via ERC-4337 Account Abstraction on EVM chains. These articles explain what AA is, what dApps you can use safely from a multisig wallet, and how SSP keeps you in control while letting you participate in DeFi protocols.
categoryIntros.news-explained: Beyond the headlines: the regulatory shifts, exchange failures, protocol incidents, and standards updates that actually affect self-custody users — explained without hype.

Features.metaTitle: Features - SSP Wallet | Advanced Crypto Security & Multi-Chain Support
Features.metaDescription: True 2-of-2 multisig, WalletConnect v2, 15+ blockchains, fiat on/off-ramp, crypto swap, CSV export, and Account Abstraction. See all SSP Wallet features.

hero.description: Discover the cutting-edge technology and security features that make SSP Wallet the most advanced crypto wallet available.

security.description: Your crypto security is our top priority. Every feature is designed with security-first principles.

0.title: True 2-of-2 Multisig Protection
0.description: Revolutionary BIP48 multisignature requiring both browser and mobile device signatures. No single point of failure - impossible to compromise with just one device.

1.title: Halborn Security Audit
1.description: Professionally audited by Halborn, the leading blockchain security firm trusted by major protocols. Comprehensive penetration testing and code review completed.

2.title: Zero Data Storage Policy
2.description: Strict no-server-storage policy eliminates centralized attack vectors. Your private keys, transactions, and personal data never leave your devices.

3.title: Fully Open Source & Transparent
3.description: Complete codebase transparency with deterministic builds allows security researchers and developers to independently verify build integrity. No hidden backdoors or proprietary black boxes.

technical.description: Built with cutting-edge technology for the future of decentralized finance.

0.title: Multi-Chain Support (15+)
0.description: Native support for Bitcoin, Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, and more with unified portfolio management.

1.title: Built-in Crypto Trading
1.description: Seamless crypto swapping via integrated DEX aggregators, plus fiat on-ramp/off-ramp for buying and selling crypto with payment cards.

2.title: Account Abstraction (ERC-4337)
2.description: First wallet with native Schnorr multisignature Account Abstraction on Ethereum, enabling gasless transactions and smart contract wallets.

3.title: True 2-of-2 Multisig Security
3.description: Revolutionary BIP48 dual-device security with browser extension and mobile app. Both devices required for every transaction - ultimate protection.

4.title: Security Audited & Open Source
4.description: Fully transparent, verifiable code professionally audited by Halborn security experts. Open source with enterprise-grade security standards.

5.title: Advanced dApp Integration
5.description: WalletConnect v2 support, EIP-712 message signing, and comprehensive browser integration for seamless dApp connectivity.

comparison.description: Compare SSP Wallet to other crypto storage methods and see the difference.

Guide.metaTitle: Setup Guide - SSP Wallet | Complete Installation Instructions
Guide.metaDescription: Step-by-step guide to install and set up SSP Wallet and SSP Key. Complete setup instructions for secure crypto wallet with multi-signature protection.
Guide.videoJsonLdName: How to Install SSP Wallet and SSP Key
Guide.videoJsonLdDescription: Complete video walkthrough: install the SSP Wallet browser extension and sync the SSP Key mobile app for 2-of-2 multisignature security.
Guide.howToJsonLdName: How to Install SSP Wallet & SSP Key
Guide.howToJsonLdDescription: Complete installation guide for the SSP Wallet browser extension and the SSP Key mobile companion app required for 2-of-2 multisignature security.
Guide.heroTitle: How to Install SSP Wallet & SSP Key
Guide.heroDescriptionPart2: : install the browser extension AND the mobile app. Both devices are required for the secure 2-of-2 multisignature system that protects your crypto.
Guide.videoDescription: Watch our comprehensive video tutorial that showcases how to set up both SSP Wallet and SSP Key with detailed step-by-step instructions.
Guide.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
Guide.stepsSubtitle: Follow these detailed instructions to set up your secure crypto wallet

0.title: Visit Extension Store
0.description: Open your browser and navigate to the SSP Wallet Extension page for your browser (Chrome, Firefox, Brave)

1.title: Install Extension
1.description: Click 'Add to Chrome/Firefox' or 'Install' button. A pop-up window will appear asking if you want to add SSP Wallet. Click 'Add' or 'Install' to complete installation.

2.title: Open Wallet
2.description: Locate the SSP wallet logo in your browser and click on it. Follow the prompts to get started.

3.title: Create Password
3.description: Create your password. Please carefully read the SSP Wallet Disclaimer and acknowledge your agreement.

4.title: Create Wallet
4.description: Click 'Create Wallet' to initialize your new wallet.

5.title: Backup Seed Phrase
5.description: Click 'Show Mnemonic Wallet Seed Phrase.' Store the seed phrase securely and confirm that you have backed it up.

6.title: Finalize Setup
6.description: Click 'Create Wallet' to finalize the process. Your browser wallet is now ready!

0.title: Download Mobile App
0.description: Download SSP Key on your mobile device and open the application.

1.title: Start Synchronization
1.description: Click on 'Synchronize Key' to begin the setup process.

2.title: Set Key Password
2.description: Set an SSP Key password and confirm it. Then, click 'Setup Key.'

3.title: Backup Key Seed
3.description: Click 'Show Mnemonic Key Seed Phrase.' Store the key seed phrase securely and confirm backup.

4.title: Complete Key Setup
4.description: Click 'Setup Key.' SSP Key now serves as second authentication factor for your SSP Wallet.

5.title: Scan QR Code
5.description: Click 'Scan Code' to synchronize your SSP Key with SSP Wallet. Scan the QR code displayed on your browser.

6.title: Approve Synchronization
6.description: Click 'Approve Synchronization' and confirm with your Key password. You'll be notified of successful sync.

Guide.tipsSubtitle: Follow these important security tips to keep your wallet safe

0.title: Secure Your Seed Phrases
0.description: Store both wallet and key seed phrases in a secure, offline location. Never share them with anyone.

1.title: Use Strong Passwords
1.description: Create unique, strong passwords for both your wallet and mobile key app.

2.title: Keep Mobile Secure
2.description: Ensure your mobile device has screen lock and consider using biometric authentication.

Guide.successDescription: By following these steps, you have successfully installed and set up both SSP Wallet and SSP Key, ensuring a secure and seamless user experience.
